basic_details.short_information: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) Research Associate (Genetics & Plant Breeding) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ANGRAU Research Associate (Genetics & Plant Breeding) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation for men: Not exceeding 35 years Age relaxation for women: Not exceeding 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. (Agricultural Biotechnology / Genetics & Plant Breeding), M.Sc. (Ag.) in Agricultural Biotechnology / Genetics & Plant Breeding with NET qualified
qualification.details: Ph.D. (Agricultural Biotechnology / Genetics & Plant Breeding) (or) M.Sc. (Ag.) in Agricultural Biotechnology / Genetics & Plant Breeding with NET qualified. Masters Degree in the relevant subject with 1st Division or 60% marks or equivalent overall grade point average with experience in Rice Biotechnology work is highly required of Research Experience as evidence from Service Certificate / Fellowship / Associate ship / Training / publications. All the relevant degrees should be completed in the ICAR accredited University / Colleges.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. Rs.61,000/- + HRA - Rs.67,000/- + HRA Per Month
salary_details.details: For Ph.D. holders: Rs.67,000/- + HRA per month For M.Sc. (Ag.) holders: Rs.61,000/- + HRA per month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANGRAU Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview, and the interview is scheduled for 09 June 2026. Candidates should attend the interview on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Agricultural Biotechnology / Genetics & Plant Breeding, or an M.Sc. (Ag.) in the same fields with NET qualification. A Master's degree with 1st Division or 60% marks and relevant experience is also highly desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for male candidates is 35 years, and for female candidates, it is 40 years. The overall maximum age limit is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 61,000/- + HRA per month for M.Sc. (Ag.) holders and Rs. 67,000/- + HRA per month for Ph.D. holders.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate (Genetics & Plant Breeding) position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for ANGRAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Maruteru, Andhra Pradesh, with the pincode 534122.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The job type is specified as Contractual.
